items.situation: grand reopening of a renovated performance hall
items.announcement: Good morning, students. I'm delighted to share that the newly renovated Pemberton Performance Hall will officially reopen this Thursday, March 14, with a free evening celebration beginning at six o'clock. The hall now features upgraded acoustic panels, expanded balcony seating, and a fully accessible main entrance on Chapel Street. Refreshments will be served in the lobby, and the music department's string quartet will perform a short welcome set. Seating is first-come, first-served, so we recommend arriving a little early. To attend, you'll need to reserve a spot through the box office page on the department website by Wednesday at noon.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce the reopening celebration of a renovated performance hall
options.B: To explain why the hall's renovation took longer than planned
options.C: To recruit students to perform in the music department's quartet
options.D: To advertise paid music lessons offered by the department

questions.explanation: 公告核心是宣布翻新后的演奏厅重新开放及庆祝活动，故 A 对。B 解释延期原因，公告未提；C 招募演奏者属凭空发挥；D 推广收费课程与公告意图不符。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what must students do to attend the celebration?

options.A: Purchase a ticket at the Chapel Street entrance
options.B: Bring their own folding chairs for the balcony
options.C: Reserve a spot through the box office page by Wednesday noon
options.D: Sign up to help serve refreshments in the lobby

questions.explanation: 公告明确要求周三中午前通过院系网站的票务页面预约座位，故 C 对。A 把免费活动误说成购票；B 公告说座位先到先得但未要求自带椅子；D 帮忙提供茶点未被提及。

items.situation: annual outdoor movie night with blanket seating
items.announcement: Attention students. The Film Society is thrilled to host our annual Starlight Movie Night this Saturday, April 6, on the great lawn beside Hartwell Commons. This year's feature is a classic adventure film, and the projection will start right after sunset, at roughly eight fifteen. Seating is entirely blanket-style, so please bring a blanket or a low beach chair, since we won't be providing any seating ourselves. A food truck near the entrance will sell snacks and drinks throughout the evening. If it rains, we'll move the screening into the Hartwell Commons ballroom, and we'll post any updates on the Film Society's social media page by five o'clock.

questions.stem: What is the announcement mainly about?

options.A: A change to the operating hours of Hartwell Commons
options.B: An annual outdoor movie night hosted by the Film Society
options.C: A fundraising campaign to buy new projection equipment
options.D: A schedule for weekly film classes offered on campus

questions.explanation: 公告整体在宣传电影社主办的年度户外电影之夜，故 B 对。A 营业时间变更与公告内容无关；C 募捐购置设备未提及；D 每周电影课程属凭空发挥。

questions.stem: According to the announcement, what are attendees asked to bring?

options.A: A printed ticket from the Film Society office
options.B: Their own snacks since none will be sold
options.C: An umbrella in case the ballroom is full
options.D: A blanket or low beach chair for seating

questions.explanation: 公告说采用毯子式座位且社团不提供座椅，须自带毯子或低沙滩椅，故 D 对。A 打印门票未提及；B 与公告矛盾，现场有餐车售卖小吃；C 雨伞和满座属凭空发挥。

items.situation: professional headshot day at the career center
items.announcement: Good afternoon. The Career Center is hosting a Professional Headshot Day this coming Tuesday, May 13, in the Loring Building conference room from ten in the morning until three in the afternoon. A volunteer photographer will take complimentary headshots suitable for resumes and professional profiles. Because slots fill quickly, you'll need to book a fifteen-minute appointment through the career portal in advance; walk-ins can only be accommodated if a scheduled student doesn't show. We suggest wearing solid, neutral colors, as busy patterns can look distracting in small thumbnail images. Edited photos will be emailed to you within one week, so don't expect them on the spot.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain how to edit professional photos at home
options.B: To recruit volunteer photographers for the career center
options.C: To inform students about a free professional headshot event
options.D: To announce that the Loring conference room is closing

questions.explanation: 公告核心是通知职业中心举办的免费专业头像拍摄活动，故 C 对。A 在家修图与公告意图不符；B 招募志愿摄影师，公告中摄影师已确定；D 会议室关闭与公告事实矛盾。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students who arrive without an appointment?

options.A: They may not get a photo unless a booked slot opens up
options.B: They will automatically be placed at the front of the line
options.C: They must pay a small fee that booked students avoid
options.D: They will receive their edited photos faster than others

questions.explanation: 公告说临时到场者只有在预约学生缺席时才能被接待，可推 A。B 与'预约先行'相反；C 收费在公告中无依据，活动免费；D 加快出片属过度推断。

items.situation: campus dining hall switching to summer hours
items.announcement: Attention students and staff. Beginning Monday, June 2, the Maple Court dining hall will switch to its summer schedule. Breakfast service will end, and the hall will open only for lunch from eleven thirty to two and for dinner from five to seven, Monday through Friday, with no weekend service. The grab-and-go kiosk near the north entrance will stay open until eight each weekday for students who need a later option. Meal-plan balances from the spring term will not carry over, so please use any remaining funds before May thirtieth. We'll post the full summer menu on the dining services page later this week.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To announce that Maple Court will close permanently in June
options.B: To advertise a new grab-and-go kiosk opening for the first time
options.C: To request student suggestions for the summer dining menu
options.D: To inform diners that the hall is switching to a summer schedule

questions.explanation: 公告核心是通知餐厅改用夏季时间表及相关变动，故 D 对。A 永久关闭与公告矛盾；B 称小卖部首次开放，公告只是延长其时间；C 征集菜单建议属凭空发挥。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about students with leftover spring meal-plan funds?

options.A: Their funds will be converted into summer kiosk credit
options.B: They should spend the funds before they are forfeited
options.C: They can request a cash refund at the dining office
options.D: They will receive a discount on the summer meal plan

questions.explanation: 公告说春季余额不会结转，请在 5 月 30 日前用完，可推应在被作废前花掉，故 B 对。A 转为小卖部额度无依据；C 现金退款未提及；D 夏季餐计划折扣属凭空发挥。

items.situation: winter gear swap with voucher system
items.announcement: Good morning, everyone. The Student Activities Office is running our annual Winter Gear Swap this Friday, January 24, in the Atrium of Kessler Hall from noon until four. Here's how it works: bring any clean, gently used coats, boots, or snow pants to the drop-off table, and for each item you donate, you'll receive a voucher. You can then exchange those vouchers for other gear at the swap, one voucher per item. Anything left over at the end of the day will be given to a local shelter. There's no charge to participate, but please make sure your donations are washed and in good condition.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of this announcement?

options.A: To explain a winter gear swap that uses a voucher system
options.B: To collect monetary donations for a local homeless shelter
options.C: To advertise discounted winter clothing at the campus store
options.D: To remind students to return borrowed winter equipment

questions.explanation: 公告核心是介绍使用代金券机制的冬季装备交换活动，故 A 对。B 募集现金捐款，公告募集的是装备且无关收款；C 校园店打折与公告无关；D 归还借用装备属凭空发挥。

questions.stem: What can be inferred about a student who donates two coats?

options.A: They must pay a small entry fee to join the swap
options.B: They will have their coats shipped to a shelter directly
options.C: They can take up to two items in exchange at the swap
options.D: They are guaranteed to receive newer coats than they gave

questions.explanation: 公告说每捐一件得一张券，每张券换一件，故捐两件外套可换最多两件，C 可推。A 收费与'免费参加'矛盾；B 直接寄往收容所是当天剩余物资的去向，非捐赠者的外套；D 保证换到更新的外套属过度推断。
